title: Pressure Syringes
description: Replaces boring 2D model of injectors from Tactical Aid mod with more cool-looking 3D models based on the ones from ROBLOX Pressure.
body:
I got kinda tired of boring Tactical Aid injector models, so i decided to remodel them, the resource pack was meant to be for me only, but my friends liked the models so i decided to publish it. The models with the resource pack installed resemble the syringe model from Roblox experience "Pressure" v4.5 . The resourcepack wont recieve any updates in the future, with the exception of making it usable on newer versions if Tactical Aid gets updated. 

You ***can NOT*** use my models in your **projects**, with an **exception if i agree** on you using them. 

You ***can NOT*** claim my models as your own ***AT ALL***, 

You ***can't*** either sell them. 

You ***CAN use and showcase*** my resource pack **in your videos**.
